title: Jaden's Nether Expansion Texture Compat
description: Adds compatibility to various bottle textures, mushrooms, and arrows from other mods.
body: This resource pack adds some compatibility textures for JNE's **Conflict Pack**. It adds various bottle, arrow, and mushroom textures. It also fixes the tether & subtle potions (and subtle tipped arrow) from **Caverns & Chasms** to work with JNE.
